editor_signals: Betting data is framed as context for expectation, pressure and late movement, not as a prediction or pick.
WNBA coverage is ready to join the main board as soon as source reports are available.
Sports coverage is prioritizing human newsroom framing over schedule-first or score-line-first presentation.
Homepage selection now applies source-domain balance, data/context scoring and league spread before publishing the top board.
